question: Return the name of the high school student with the most friends.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.identifier FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.learner_key GROUP BY T1.key ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.identifier FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.learner_key GROUP BY T1.key ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
